object.script:
samples = {}
tick = 1 iter = 1 tickStart = 1
fuelD = 0 fuelDOld = 0 fuelA = 0 fuelAOld = 0 speedA = 0 speedAOld = 0
rate1 = 0 rate2 = 0 time = 0 range = 0
start = false
function onTick() fuel = math.max(input.getNumber(1), 0) speed = math.abs(input.getNumber(2))
sampleMax = property.getNumber("Sampling time")
if tickStart < 60 then tickStart = tickStart+1 end
if not start and tickStart >= 60 and fuel > 0 then start = true for i = 1,sampleMax do samples[i] = {} samples[i][1] = fuel samples[i][2] = 0 end fuelA = fuel fuelAOld = fuel end
if start then if tick > 60 then fuelAOld = fuelA fuelDOld = fuelD speedAOld = speedA speedA = 0 fuelA = 0
tick = 0
samples[iter][1] = fuel samples[iter][2] = speed
for i in pairs(samples) do fuelA = fuelA + samples[i][1] speedA = speedA + samples[i][2] end fuelA = fuelA/sampleMax speedA = speedA/sampleMax fuelD = fuelAOld - fuelA
iter = iter+1 if iter > sampleMax then iter = 1 end end
tick1 = tick/60 rate1 = math.max(fuelDOld*(1-tick1)+fuelD*tick1, 0) fuelALerp = math.max(fuelAOld*(1-tick1)+fuelA*tick1, 0) speedALerp = math.max(speedAOld*(1-tick1)+speedA*tick1, 0)
if rate1 > 0.001 then time = math.min(fuelALerp/(rate1*60), 1000) range = math.min(speedALerp*time*0.06, 10000) else time = 0 range = 0 end
if speed > 1 then rate2 = rate1*1000/speed else rate2 = 0 end
tick = tick+1 end
output.setNumber(1, rate1) output.setNumber(2, rate2) output.setNumber(3, math.floor(time)) output.setNumber(4, math.floor(range)) end

object.script:
--math & input shorthands m,i,o,p = math,input,output,property ign,osn,igb,osb = i.getNumber, o.setNumber, i.getBool, o.setBool pgn,pgb = p.getNumber, p.getBool abs,cos,sin,acos,asin,tan,atan = m.abs, m.cos, m.sin, m.acos, m.asin, m.tan, m.atan pi = m.pi pi2 = pi*2
--Basic Functions function vec(x,y,z) return {x=x or 0,y=y or 0,z=z or 0} end function add(a,b) return vec(a.x+b.x, a.y+b.y, a.z+b.z) end function mult(a,b) return vec(a.x*b.x, a.y*b.y, a.z*b.z) end function multf(a,n) return vec(a.x*n, a.y*n, a.z*n) end function invert(a) return multf(a,-1) end function subt(a,b) return add(a,invert(b)) end function length(a) return m.sqrt(a.x*a.x+a.y*a.y+a.z*a.z) end function divf(a,n) return multf(a,1/n) end function norm(a) return divf(a,length(a)) end function dot(a,b) return a.x*b.x+a.y*b.y+a.z*b.z end function cross(a,b) return vec(a.y*b.z-a.z*b.y, a.z*b.x-a.x*b.z, a.x*b.y-a.y*b.x) end function project(a,b) return multf(norm(b), dot(a, norm(b))) end function reject(a,b) return subt(a, multf(norm(b), dot(a, norm(b)))) end function reflect(a,b,factor) return subt(a, multf(reject(a, b), factor or 2)) end function stoc(hor,ver,d) local d=d or 1 return vec(m.sin(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.cos(hor)*m.cos(ver)*d, m.sin(ver)*d) end
function vecDelta(a,spot) if not vecDeltaTable then vecDeltaTable = {} vecDeltaTable[spot] = {oldVec = vec(),deltaVec = vec()} elseif not vecDeltaTable[spot] then vecDeltaTable[spot] = {oldVec = vec(),deltaVec = vec()} end vecDeltaTable[spot].deltaVec = subt(a,vecDeltaTable[spot].oldVec) vecDeltaTable[spot].oldVec = a
return vecDeltaTable[spot].deltaVec end
function pulse(var,spot) if not pulseTable then pulseTable = {} pulseTable[spot] = {pulse = false,touch = false} elseif not pulseTable[spot] then pulseTable[spot] = {pulse = false,touch = false} end pulseTable[spot].pulse = var ~= pulseTable[spot].touch and var pulseTable[spot].touch = var return pulseTable[spot].pulse end
--initial variables modes = { [1] = "continualprotect", [2] = "activeprotect", [3] = "off" } modecounter = pgn("System Setting") chaffmaxdist = pgn("max dist from chaff (m)") chafflastpos = vec() chafdecay = 360--ticks for chaff to decay chafflife = 0--counts how long last chaff has existed chaffout = false
--small functions function debuglight(bool) osb(2,bool) end function chaff() osb(1,true);chafflastpos = mypos;chafflife = 0;chaffout = true end function lerp(a,b,t) return a * (1-t) + b * t end -- 0 to 1 function clamp(a,lo,hi) return m.min(m.max(a,lo),hi) end
function onTick()
--inputs mypos = vec(ign(1),ign(2),ign(3)) spd = length(vecDelta(mypos,"spd"))*60--tested this, it is accurate chaffdist = lerp(8,chaffmaxdist,clamp(spd,0,10)/10) --how far away chaff can get from you before a new one is popped --lerp between 8m and user set distnace based on speed 0 to 10m/s rwr = igb(1)--may be solid on, may blink
--mode cycling if pulse(igb(2),"cycle") then modecounter = modecounter + 1 if modecounter > 3 then modecounter = 1 end end mode = modes[modecounter]
--output selected mode for i = 1,5 do osb(i,false) end osb(modecounter+1,true)
--main logic loop osb(1,false)--preset to false so chaff function can overwrite it if we should chaff, using this & function for readability if chaffout then chafflife = chafflife + 1 end--if a chaff is in the air, count toward it's decay if chafflife >= chafdecay then--if a chaff has existed for as long as it takes to decay, there isn't a chaff in the air chaffout = false end if mode == "continualprotect" then
if length(subt(chafflastpos,mypos)) >= chaffdist then chaff() else if chafflife >= chafdecay then chaff() end end elseif mode == "activeprotect" then if rwr then if length(subt(chafflastpos,mypos)) >= chaffdist then chaff() else if chafflife >= chafdecay then chaff() end end end end end

object.script:
--written by judgementalbird in a sleep deprived haze :yum:
igb,osb,ign,osn = input.getBool, output.setBool,input.getNumber,output.setNumber
state = 0 statemin = 0 statemax = property.getNumber("time ticks")
segment1_end = statemax * property.getNumber("first end ratio") segment2_end = statemax * property.getNumber("second end ratio") segment3_end = statemax * property.getNumber("third end ratio") -- The last segment goes until statemax
function frontgear(newstate) if newstate == true then--open up osn(1,0) else--close osn(1,1) end end function frontdoor(newstate) if newstate == true then--open up osn(2,1) else--close osn(2,0) end end function reargear(newstate) if newstate == true then--open up osn(3,1) else--close osn(3,-0.05) end end function reardoor(newstate) if newstate == true then--open up osn(4,-0.75) else--close osn(4,0) end end function releaselocks(release) output.setBool(1,release)--release if true end
function onTick() if igb(2) then state = math.min(state + 1, statemax) else state = math.max(state - 1, statemin) end
if state >= 0 and state < segment1_end then --gear out, door in, locks engage frontgear(true) frontdoor(false)
reargear(true) reardoor(false)
releaselocks(false) elseif state >= segment1_end and state < segment2_end then --gear out, door out, locks release frontgear(true) frontdoor(true)
reargear(true) reardoor(true)
releaselocks(true) elseif state >= segment2_end and state < segment3_end then --gear in, door out, locks release frontgear(false) frontdoor(true)
reargear(false) reardoor(true)
releaselocks(true) elseif state >= segment3_end and state <= statemax then --gear in, door in, locks release frontgear(false) frontdoor(false)
reargear(false) reardoor(false)
releaselocks(true) end end

if(y(m.p)>0)and not(m.C>0)then local ae=0 for F,b_ in M(a)do if ae==0 then if y(A(a[F]._,m._))<=ay then ae=F a[F]._=m._ a[F].L=0 end else if y(A(a[F]._,m._))<=ay then S(a,F)end end end if ae==0 then
